problem_statement: The software delivery lifecycle doctrine must be enforceable instead of only described in prose.
success_criteria: valid SDLC examples pass schema and semantic validation
invalid SDLC examples fail with explicit errors
workspace preflight includes SDLC artifact, state machine, release readiness, security review, and PR enforcement checks
non_goals: no branch merge or release publication
constraints: effect-bearing SDLC decisions require UAO, causal decision trace, and receipt references
production claims require deployment witness evidence
